compiled_state.title: Modify scripts to read model IDs from config
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
1. enrich-file-impact.sh: Replace MODEL="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" with MODEL=$(bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/resolve-model-id.sh" haiku), check exit code, exit 1 on failure
2. semantic-conflict-check.py: Replace MODEL = "claude-haiku-4-20250514" with subprocess.check_output(["bash", resolve_path, "haiku"]). Config-read failure is FATAL (sys.exit(1)), NOT _graceful_error — deliberate departure from existing graceful degradation per SC3
3. generate-skill-eval.sh: Replace hardcoded model IDs on lines 215/219 with resolve-model-id.sh calls at script start
4. Remove RED marker

Gate 3 bundling: identical 1-2 line pattern replacement across 3 scripts, shared RED test (Task 5).

TDD: Task 5 RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format-check passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No hardcoded model ID in enrich-file-impact.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh
- [ ] No hardcoded model ID in semantic-conflict-check.py
  Verify: ! grep -q 'claude-haiku-4-20250514' plugins/dso/scripts/semantic-conflict-check.py
- [ ] No hardcoded model ID in generate-skill-eval.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' plugins/dso/scripts/generate-skill-eval.sh
